subject: NIT for IT Infrastructure Modernization — NMRDA Nagpur
body:
Dear Sir/Madam,

Nagpur Metropolitan Region Development Authority (NMRDA) invites bids for the IT Infrastructure Modernization Project under Smart City Mission. The scope includes server procurement, network upgradation, and data center setup for 3 municipal offices.

Tender Reference: NMRDA/IT/2026/0342
Estimated Value: Rs. 2.5 Crore
Last Date for Submission: 20 Feb 2026, 5:00 PM IST
Pre-Bid Meeting: 15 Feb 2026, 11:00 AM at NMRDA HQ

Tender documents can be downloaded from https://etender.maharashtra.gov.in

Regards,
Deputy Engineer (IT)
NMRDA, Nagpur

subject: Urgent: GST Portal Down Since 3 Days — Immediate Attention Required
body:
Dear VIPL Team,

This is to bring to your urgent attention that the GST filing portal deployed by your team for our regional office has been non-functional since 9th February. Officers are unable to process any returns and taxpayers are complaining daily.

We have already reported this twice via phone but no resolution has been provided. If this is not resolved by tomorrow EOD, we will have to escalate to the Commissioner.

Please treat this as highest priority.

Ashok Deshmukh
Assistant Commissioner, GST Division II
Nagpur

subject: Request for Quotation — Smart City Surveillance System
body:
Hi,

We are evaluating vendors for the AI-based surveillance system for Nagpur Smart City Phase 2. Your company was recommended by STPI.

Could you please share:
1. Your capability presentation for CCTV/surveillance projects
2. Pricing for 500-camera setup with AI analytics
3. References from similar government projects

We need responses by 18 Feb as the vendor selection committee meets on 20 Feb.

Best regards,
Priya Sharma
Project Manager, Nagpur Smart City Ltd.

subject: Invoice #4521 — Server Maintenance Feb 2026
body:
Dear Team,

Please find attached the invoice for monthly server maintenance services for February 2026.

Invoice #: SW/2026/4521
Amount: Rs. 45,000 + GST
Due Date: 28 Feb 2026

Kindly process the payment as per agreed terms.

Regards,
Ravi Kumar
Accounts Department
Server World India Pvt Ltd

subject: MoU Discussion — Stratzi AI Partnership for Government Sector
body:
Dear Shreyas,

I am Neha Kapoor, Business Development Head at Stratzi AI. We specialize in AI/ML solutions for government e-governance platforms.

We've been following VIPL's impressive work with DRDO and STPI, and believe there's a strong synergy between our companies. We'd like to explore a formal partnership (MoU) to jointly bid on upcoming government AI projects in Vidarbha region.

Would you be available for a call next week to discuss this further?

Warm regards,
Neha Kapoor
Stratzi AI, Mumbai

description: Internal leave application — should be LOW
subject: Leave Application — 14-15 Feb 2026
body:
Dear Sir,

I would like to apply for casual leave on 14th and 15th February 2026 for personal reasons. My pending tasks have been handed over to Amit.

Kindly approve.

Thanks,
Rajesh Kumar
Software Developer
VIPL

body:

description: DRDO security clearance — should be CRITICAL
subject: Security Clearance Update — DRDO Project Kavach Phase II
body:
Dear VIPL Management,

This is regarding the security clearance renewal for your team members working on Project Kavach Phase II. The current clearances expire on 28 Feb 2026.

Please submit the following documents to our security division by 19 Feb 2026:
1. Updated employee declarations (Form SEC-7A)
2. Background verification certificates
3. Non-disclosure agreement renewals

Failure to submit on time will result in suspension of project access, effective 1 March 2026.

Col. Vikram Singh
Security Division
DRDO, Pune

subject: VPN Access Issue — STPI Nagpur Office
body:
Hello VIPL Support,

Several staff at STPI Nagpur office are unable to connect to the VPN since this morning. The error message says 'Authentication server unreachable'. About 15 people are affected and cannot access internal systems.

Could someone please look into this today? It's impacting our work.

Thanks,
Meena Patil
IT Coordinator, STPI Nagpur
